steps.title: Separate the clauses
steps.content: The quotation ending with idealistic direction completes one independent clause. The words after the blank begin another independent clause about what judges recognized in 1909.

steps.title: Use a semicolon
steps.content: B creates a comma splice by joining the clauses with only a comma. C creates a run-on by using no punctuation. D adds and in a way that breaks the sentence structure. The semicolon correctly joins the two clauses. The answer is A.
